# kCFProxyAutoConfigurationJavaScriptKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFProxyAutoConfigurationJavaScriptKey ](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxyautoconfigurationjavascriptkey)

-  kCFProxyAutoConfigurationJavaScriptKey 

Global Variable# kCFProxyAutoConfigurationJavaScriptKey

iOS 3.0+iPadOS 3.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.7+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFProxyAutoConfigurationJavaScriptKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxyautoconfigurationjavascriptkey#Discussion)

A `CFString` value containing the full JavaScript source for the proxy autoconfiguration (PAC) file. This key is only present for proxies of type `kCFProxyAutoConfigurationJavaScript`.
